title: PARENT-ACTIVITY — Dad at airport waiting with flowers, Mama runs to him
prompt: warm wood interior, brass pendants overhead. Medium two-shot in the airport arrivals hall, soft afternoon light through large glass windows, polished floor, arrivals signage in the soft background. @young_Papa standing center-frame holding a small bouquet of pink-and-white peonies in right hand, eyes SCAN the arrivals doors, left hand ADJUSTS collar in a small nervous gesture. @young_Mama appearing through the arrivals door with a small wheeled suitcase behind, head LIFTS, eyes WIDEN with joy, legs RUN forward. Right arm RAISES the bouquet, left arm EXTENDS open in welcome. They run into hug, arms WRAP around, hands GRIP shoulders. Mouth KISSES the top of her head. young_Papa (gentle): "You're here."
